title: get_tablet_image_links data payload
description: v0.39.0 IIIF / eBL imagery links for a tablet. Returns the eBL fragmentarium landing URL + photo endpoint URL + ancient find-spot region (Patel's archaeological-provenance ask, distinct from modern museum collection). Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

ebl_photo_url.description: v0.78.0 — the HUMAN SPA viewer route (.../fragmentarium/{id}/photo). Opens an HTML page and 302-redirects; NOT directly fetchable as an image. For raw bytes use ebl_photo_api_url + fetch_tablet_photo.

ebl_photo_api_url.description: v0.78.0 — the FETCHABLE eBL REST endpoint (.../api/fragments/{id}/photo) that serves raw image/jpeg bytes. Optional (the catch-path fallback may omit it). British-Museum-collection material — link/fetch-to-cache only.

ancient_find_spot.description: Ancient dig-site provenance (e.g. 'Kuyunjik', 'Sippar'). Distinct from modern museum collection prefix.

modern_collection_prefix.description: Museum collection prefix (e.g. 'K' for British Museum Kuyunjik, 'BM' for British Museum, 'Sm' for Smith collection).
